title: lithocardium insigne var. normale
intro: Lithocardium insigne var. normale, also known as Digitalis purpurea subsp. purpurea, is a plant species commonly referred to as foxglove. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to increase cardiac output and reduce symptoms of heart failure due to its cardiac glycoside content. The health benefits of Lithocardium insigne var. normale include the treatment of atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and certain cases of angina. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically obtained through the leaves, which can be dried and made into tea, capsules, or tablets under the guidance of a medical professional.
